items.acceptance_criterion: Add ureq with rustls TLS in rustyred-thg-connectors.
items.verification: rustyredcore_THG/crates/rustyred-thg-connectors/Cargo.toml uses ureq 3.3.0 with rustls. Verified by cargo test -p rustyred-thg-connectors.

items.acceptance_criterion: Http target serializes as transport=http and round-trips.
items.verification: Implemented ConnectionTarget::Http and ConnectorAuth::Bearer. Verified by transport_test::http_target_round_trips_with_bearer_auth in cargo test -p rustyred-thg-connectors.

items.acceptance_criterion: HTTP JSON responses, SSE responses, session header carryover, JSON-RPC errors, and non-2xx transport errors work.
items.verification: Implemented blocking HttpTransport with JSON and text/event-stream handling plus Mcp-Session-Id capture/send. Verified by transport_test::http_request_reads_sse_response_and_sends_session_id_next_time, transport_test::http_jsonrpc_error_maps_to_rpc_error, and transport_test::http_non_success_status_maps_to_transport_error.

items.deliverable: SSE framing parser, isolated for in-memory testing
items.acceptance_criterion: SSE parser skips notifications and non-matching ids, returning the wanted JSON-RPC message.
items.verification: Implemented read_sse_response over BufRead. Verified by transport_test::sse_parser_skips_notifications_and_mismatched_ids.

items.acceptance_criterion: Constructor resolves static headers and bearer auth without performing a handshake.
items.verification: Implemented connect_http and HttpTransport::new. Verified through connect_transport HTTP dispatch plus HTTP transport tests in cargo test -p rustyred-thg-connectors.

items.acceptance_criterion: connect_transport dispatches stdio and http; spawn_stdio rejects non-stdio targets.
items.verification: Implemented ConnectedTransport and connect_transport. Verified by transport_test::connect_transport_dispatches_http_and_stdio.

items.deliverable: Switch the two hardcoded call sites
items.acceptance_criterion: bridge.rs and invoke.rs use connect_transport, and invoke can fire over HTTP.
items.verification: connect_target and invoke_affordance now call connect_transport. Verified by bridge_test::http_bridge_completes_json_handshake_and_registers_tools and invoke_test::allowlist_can_fire_over_http_target_and_record_outcome.

items.acceptance_criterion: New HTTP transport types and constructors are exported from lib.rs.
items.verification: lib.rs re-exports HttpTransport, ConnectorAuth, connect_http, connect_transport, and ConnectedTransport. Verified by cargo test -p rustyred-thg-connectors.

items.deliverable: GitHub App credential and installation-token minting
items.acceptance_criterion: Installation token minting caches within the reuse window and refreshes after expiry.
items.verification: Implemented apps/theorem-harness-server/src/github_app.rs with env config, RS256 App JWT signing, token exchange, cache, repo installation lookup, PR file API, and GitCredentialResolver. Verified by github_app::tests::installation_token_reuses_cache_and_remints_after_expiry in apps/theorem-harness-server cargo test.

items.acceptance_criterion: Bearer clone uses http.extraHeader, public clone path stays credential-free, and durable job request stores installation_id without a token.
items.verification: Implemented GitCredential, GitCredentialResolver, fetch_repo_with_credential, installation_id on IngestJobRequest, and CodeIndexRuntime resolver injection. Public None-path remains credential-free, with documented divergence that http.lowSpeed*/GIT_SSH_COMMAND hardening now applies to public and authed clone paths. Verified by cargo test -p rustyred-thg-code, including repo_fetch::tests::fetch_repo_with_bearer_uses_extra_header_and_omits_helper_reset and tests::authed_job_request_persists_installation_id_but_no_token.

items.deliverable: Webhook receiver and incremental reindex trigger
items.acceptance_criterion: Valid signed push webhook enqueues reindex with installation_id; forged signature rejects; replayed delivery id is idempotent.
items.verification: Implemented apps/theorem-harness-server/src/github.rs webhook router with X-Hub-Signature-256 verification, delivery dedupe, and push reindex submission. Verified by route-level tower::oneshot tests github::tests::forged_signature_returns_401_without_enqueueing and github::tests::redelivered_delivery_id_is_accepted_without_duplicate_enqueue, plus helper tests github::tests::verifies_github_signature and github::tests::deduplicates_delivery_ids in apps/theorem-harness-server cargo test.

items.acceptance_criterion: PR/issue/review/push events upsert collaboration nodes and idempotent edges to people, files, PRs, commits, and symbols where resolvable.
items.verification: Implemented PullRequest, Issue, Review, Commit, and Person upserts plus AUTHORED_BY, REVIEWS, PART_OF, TOUCHES_FILE, and MENTIONS_SYMBOL edges via CodeIndexRuntime graph mutation/query methods. Verified by github::tests::pull_request_event_writes_pr_author_and_file_edges in apps/theorem-harness-server cargo test.
